name: Sort Functionality Regression
description: 1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Search for "phone". 3. Select "Price: Low to High" sort option. 4. Wait for results refresh. 5. Validate sorting dropdown reflects selected option. 6. Close browser.
